design_philosophy: High-density data visualization, command-center precision, and clear hierarchy. The UI acts as a tactical overlay for the live match.

layout_spacing.gap_strategy: Tight metrics. gap-4 for related stats, gap-8 for distinct sections.
layout_spacing.padding: p-4 sm:p-6 on standard cards, p-2 on dense list items.
layout_spacing.border_radius: rounded-lg or rounded-xl max. Avoid excessive roundness to maintain the athletic/tactical feel.

match_header.layout: Relative container with stadium image background and dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#0F1115] via-[#0F1115]/80 to-[#0F1115]/40).
match_header.content: Flex container with Home Team (Logo + Name) left, Center Column (Score + Time + Status), Away Team (Logo + Name) right.
match_header.status_pill: Inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-bold bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border border-red-500/20. Include a pulsing dot (animate-pulse).
match_header.metadata: Bottom row for League, Stadium, Referee in text-xs text-slate-400.

tabs.customization: Scrollable tab list horizontally (overflow-x-auto no-scrollbar). Active tab gets border-b-2 border-lime-400 text-white. Inactive tabs text-slate-400.

events_timeline.layout: Vertical rail. Relative container with w-0.5 absolute line down the center.
events_timeline.items: Grid grid-cols-[1fr_auto_1fr] gap-4 items-center mb-4. Minute marker in the center (rounded-full bg-[#1C2026] border border-[#2A2E36] px-2 py-1 text-xs font-mono).
events_timeline.alignment: Home events text-right col-start-1, Away events text-left col-start-3.

attack_momentum.type: AreaChart or BarChart with stacked values
attack_momentum.styling: Home (positive Y) uses fill='#A3E635'. Away (negative Y) uses fill='#FFFFFF' or '#94A3B8'. Hidden axes, minimal grid lines. Surges/Goals marked with vertical reference lines or scatter dots.

lineups_pitch.layout_mobile: Vertical orientation pitch. Home team top half, Away team bottom half.
lineups_pitch.layout_desktop: Horizontal orientation. Home left, Away right.
lineups_pitch.pitch_styling: bg-[#121A16] with white/opacity-20 border lines simulating pitch markings (center circle, penalty box).
lineups_pitch.player_chip: Absolute positioning (or flex-grid proxy). Contains 32x32 rounded-full photo, absolute -top-1 -right-1 rating pill (e.g., bg-blue-500 text-[10px]), absolute -bottom-1 -left-1 shirt number (bg-black text-white text-[10px]). Surname label below in text-[10px] bg-black/60 px-1 rounded.

stats_scrolling.layout: List of rows. Each row: Flex justify-between mb-1 for text (Home val, Label, Away val).
stats_scrolling.progress_bar: Custom dual progress bar. Center-aligned. Left side (Home) bg-lime-400 rotates/fills right-to-left. Right side (Away) bg-slate-300 fills left-to-right. Parent background bg-[#2A2E36] h-1.5 rounded-full.

head_to_head.aggregate_badges: Flex gap-2. W (bg-green-500/20 text-green-500), D (bg-slate-500/20 text-slate-400), L (bg-red-500/20 text-red-500).
head_to_head.match_rows: Compact flex items-center justify-between py-2 border-b border-[#2A2E36] text-sm.

standings_mini.highlight_logic: For the two teams currently playing, add 'bg-lime-400/5' and 'border-l-2 border-lime-400' to their table rows.

header_background.description: Dark stadium floodlights background for match header overlay

icons: lucide-react for UI interactions, but use simple solid SVGs or FontAwesome/Phosphor for soccer specific events like whistle, yellow card, red card, substitution arrows.
instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a React hybrid_fullstack match details page. Use existing Cloudy Pitch routing if applicable.
Strictly follow the color palette: Background #0F1115, Surfaces #1C2026, Accent Lime #A3E635. Do not deviate.
Implement the Tabs component from Shadcn, ensuring it handles horizontal overflow gracefully on mobile devices.

For the 'Attack Momentum' chart, implement a Recharts AreaChart. Map Home team possession/attacks to positive Y-axis values with the lime fill. Map Away team possession/attacks to negative Y-axis values with white fill.

The Lineups tab requires a visual pitch layout. Construct a container with background #121A16 and absolute positioned player chips. Use the provided 'player_portraits' media URLs for the avatar images.
For the Stats tab, construct a reusable 'DualProgressBar' component. It takes a label, leftValue, rightValue, and renders a split bar with center alignment.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive elements (tabs, player chips, list items).
Include 'lucide-react' for UI icons and setup Recharts for the momentum chart.
